name: product_page_2_products_baba-yaga-mug

observed_strengths.observation: Reviews section with Rating Snapshot, Average Customer Ratings, and individual review headlines ('The Baba Yaga mug made my day extraordinary!') — full review system active
'LIKE FREE SH*T?' H1 block on PDP — giveaway entry CTA embedded in product pages to drive engagement and email acquisition alongside purchase

Compelling limited-edition narrative in meta: 'Inspired by the witch who lives between worlds...for the bold souls that like their coffee strong and their folklore a little too real' — strong brand voice creates emotional purchase justification

missing_or_weak.observation: Mug PDP has no coffee cross-sell — natural pairing (Baba Yaga Mug + matching dark roast coffee) not surfaced; coffee + mug bundle opportunity missed on drinkware PDPs

purchase_path_notes: Limited-edition mug is a collectible item — likely purchased alongside coffee. Cross-sell to coffee (with or without discount) on mug PDPs is a high-AOV opportunity.
